message:
fix: update Helm chart default image tag from 0.0.0 to latest (#5526) (#5528)

The Chart.yaml appVersion was set to "0.0.0" which doesn't exist as a
container image tag, causing ImagePullBackOff when installing the chart
from source. Change the default appVersion to "latest" so the chart
works out of the box. Also add explicit "latest" tag to the release
workflow's Docker push step to ensure the tag stays current.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ name: kubestellar-console
 description: KubeStellar Console - AI-powered multi-cluster Kubernetes dashboard
 type: application
 version: 0.0.0
-appVersion: "0.0.0"
+appVersion: "latest"
 keywords:
   - kubernetes
   - dashboard

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ replicaCount: 1
 image:
   repository: ghcr.io/kubestellar/console
   pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
-  tag: ""  # Defaults to chart appVersion
+  tag: ""  # Defaults to chart appVersion ("latest"); overridden at release time
 
 imagePullSecrets: []
 nameOverride: ""
